summary: End-to-end testing of Session 8+9 features (EMANATOR dogfood validation). ALL 5 FEATURES PASSED: (1) Archetype hint with editable picker, (2) autoInjectMissingImports post-processor, (3) Preview renders cleanly without useAuth errors, (4) BriefProgressCard persistence across tab switches, (5) Share build time with copy-to-clipboard and tweet intent.

integration_issues.issue: CORS warning for react-router-dom from unpkg.com - 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header missing. Does not break functionality but shows in console.

issues: Signup form is minimal - just email/password fields with basic styling. Could benefit from more visual polish.

critical_code_review_comments: PASS: autoInjectMissingImports() in brief-utils.js correctly injects 'import { useAuth } from '../components/AuthContext'' as FIRST LINE in Signup.jsx
PASS: ArchetypeHint.jsx shows archetype detection with picker dropdown containing 17 archetypes
PASS: BriefProgressCard.jsx persists via messages.metadata.briefProgress - survives tab switches
PASS: ShareBuildTime component has working copy-to-clipboard and valid Twitter intent URL
PASS: Preview renders landing page and Signup page without 'useAuth is not a function' errors
PASS: stream-handler.js correctly accumulates briefProgressAccumulator and persists to message metadata
seed_data_creation: Created NexsaraV9 project with Creative Brief: Brand='NexsaraV9', Description='A SaaS workspace for marketing teams that automates campaigns', Pages='Home, Features, Pricing', Colors='Dark mode violet-blue'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session 8+9 features are COMPLETE and working. All 5 validation features passed: (1) archetype hint with editable picker, (2) autoInjectMissingImports post-processor fixes missing useAuth imports, (3) preview renders cleanly, (4) BriefProgressCard persists across tab switches, (5) share button works with copy and tweet. The EMANATOR_NEW_PIPELINE flag was removed in Session 7 - new pipeline is now unconditional. Ready for Session 10.

wave_details.label: Scaffolding (router, auth, mock api, shared UI)
